# Pull Request

## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual validation notes added when runtime behavior changed

## Operational impact

- [ ] Config schema changed
- [ ] Sync behavior changed
- [ ] Conflict handling changed
- [ ] Snapshot format changed
- [ ] Cognee ingestion or search behavior changed

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to, especially around state migration, rate limiting, or notification behavior.
